hero.titleTail: On the app, the web and offline.
hero.sub: A complete library, chapters updated every day, HD reading, offline mode and sync across all your devices.

demo.title: The whole platform, in the palm of your hand
demo.sub: Browse, read and track your progress — all synced between the web and the app.
demo.tip: Tap the tabs to explore each part of the product.

items.d: Thousands of titles from the biggest names in Asian comics.
New chapters every day — always something fresh to read.
High-resolution images with crisp zoom on every panel.
Download your favorite chapters and read with no connection.
Start on your phone, continue in the browser right where you left off.
Native apps on both stores, tuned for each platform.
No ads ever interrupting your reading. None.
Organize your collection and resume any series in seconds.
Save whole volumes for the trip, the train, wherever you go.
An interface designed for the phone first — fluid and light.

mobile.title: Read anywhere. On iPhone, Android or the web.
mobile.sub: Your library travels with you. Resume reading automatically, even with no internet.

stats.eyebrow: A library that grows every day
stats.title: Numbers that speak for themselves

plans.title: Choose how you read
plans.error: Could not load plans. Please try again later.

gift.title: Gift someone unlimited reading
gift.sub: Give the gift of full access — or redeem a code you received.

steps.d: Choose the period you want to gift.
A unique code is created in your account.
Share it by message, email or printed.
They activate the code in the app and start reading.

gift.redeemHint: The code has 12 characters and was sent by whoever gifted you.

items.name: Ana Lima
items.text: Finally a platform with everything I love that works offline. I carry my whole collection on trips.

items.name: Carlos Matos
items.text: The image quality is stunning and the app is absurdly fast. I would not trade it for anything.

items.name: Júlia Santos
items.text: I gifted my brother and he loved it. The gift code system is dead simple — done in a minute.

items.name: Rafael Tavares
items.text: I start on my phone on the bus and continue on my PC at home, right where I left off. Perfect sync.

items.a: Yes. Cancel anytime in the app or on the site, with no hassle and no fees. Access continues until the end of the period you already paid for.

items.q: Does it work on iOS and Android?
items.a: Yes. We have native apps on the App Store and Google Play, plus the full web version. Everything syncs through your account.
You can. Download chapters or whole volumes in the app and read with no internet — on a plane, the subway, anywhere. Downloads stay on your device.

items.q: What happens if I switch phones?
items.a: Nothing is lost. Your library, history and reading progress live in your account. Just log in on the new device and it all comes back.
On Premium, none. Your reading is never interrupted by ads. The free plan has light ads between chapters.
You pick a plan, generate a unique code in your account and send it to anyone. They redeem the code in the app and get access instantly.

items.q: How often are new chapters released?
items.a: Every day. We add hundreds of chapters per week, with popular series updated shortly after the official release.

items.q: Can I use it in the browser?
items.a: Yes, the web experience is complete: same library, same reader, same sync — with nothing to install.

items.q: Does the yearly plan have a discount?
items.a: It does. The yearly plan comes with 2 months free versus monthly, working out to about $4.57 per month.

finalCta.title: Start your library today.
finalCta.sub: Read in the browser, on iOS or Android. Pick up where you left off, even offline.
finalCta.note: First month with a satisfaction guarantee.

mock.synopsis: An elf mage who outlived the hero sets out on a new journey to understand what knowing them really meant.

footer.tagline: Made by people who love manga.
